parameters.jsonBody:
{
  "id": "dspjob",
  "name": "Consulta DSPJOB",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "Inicia sesión, ejecuta DSPJOB, regresa al menú y cierra la sesión.",
  "steps": [
    {
      "id": "wait-login-text",
      "action": "WAIT_FOR_TEXT",
      "description": "Esperar la pantalla de autenticación",
      "text": "Your user name:",
      "timeoutSeconds": 20,
      "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
      "id": "wait-login-fields",
      "action": "WAIT_FOR_EDITABLE_FIELDS",
      "description": "Esperar los campos de usuario y contraseña",
      "minimumFields": 2,
      "timeoutSeconds": 20,
      "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
    "id": "wait-login-keyboard",
    "action": "WAIT_FOR_KEYBOARD_UNLOCKED",
    "description": "Esperar que la pantalla de login permita escritura",
    "timeoutSeconds": 20,
    "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
      "id": "write-username",
      "action": "WRITE_FIELD",
      "description": "Escribir el usuario",
      "fieldIndex": 0,
      "value": "${AS400_USERNAME}",
      "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
      "id": "write-password",
      "action": "WRITE_FIELD",
      "description": "Escribir la contraseña",
      "fieldIndex": 1,
      "value": "${AS400_PASSWORD}",
      "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
      "id": "submit-login",
      "action": "PRESS_KEY",
      "description": "Enviar las credenciales",
      "key": "ENTER",
      "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
      "id": "wait-main-menu",
      "action": "WAIT_FOR_TEXT",
      "description": "Confirmar el inicio de sesión",
      "text": "IBM i Main Menu",
      "timeoutSeconds": 30,
      "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
      "id": "wait-main-menu-keyboard",
      "action": "WAIT_FOR_KEYBOARD_UNLOCKED",
      "description": "Esperar que el menú permita escritura",
      "timeoutSeconds": 20,
      "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
      "id": "write-dspjob",
      "action": "WRITE_FIELD",
      "description": "Escribir el comando DSPJOB",
      "fieldIndex": 0,
      "value": "DSPJOB",
      "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
      "id": "run-dspjob",
      "action": "PRESS_KEY",
      "description": "Ejecutar el comando DSPJOB",
      "key": "ENTER",
      "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
      "id": "wait-display-job",
      "action": "WAIT_FOR_TEXT",
      "description": "Confirmar la pantalla Display Job",
      "text": "Display Job",
      "timeoutSeconds": 20,
      "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
      "id": "wait-display-job-keyboard",
      "action": "WAIT_FOR_KEYBOARD_UNLOCKED",
      "description": "Esperar que Display Job permita interacción",
      "timeoutSeconds": 20,
      "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
      "id": "print-display-job",
      "action": "PRINT_SCREEN",
      "description": "Imprimir la pantalla de resultado",
      "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
      "id": "return-main-menu",
      "action": "PRESS_KEY",
      "description": "Regresar al menú principal",
      "key": "PF3",
      "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
      "id": "wait-main-menu-after-pf3",
      "action": "WAIT_FOR_TEXT",
      "description": "Confirmar el regreso al menú principal",
      "text": "IBM i Main Menu",
      "timeoutSeconds": 20,
      "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
      "id": "wait-keyboard-after-pf3",
      "action": "WAIT_FOR_KEYBOARD_UNLOCKED",
      "description": "Esperar que el menú permita escritura",
      "timeoutSeconds": 20,
      "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
      "id": "write-signoff",
      "action": "WRITE_FIELD",
      "description": "Escribir el comando SIGNOFF",
      "fieldIndex": 0,
      "value": "SIGNOFF",
      "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
      "id": "run-signoff",
      "action": "PRESS_KEY",
      "description": "Ejecutar SIGNOFF",
      "key": "ENTER",
      "continueOnError": false
    },
    {
      "id": "wait-final-screen",
      "action": "WAIT_FOR_TEXT",
      "description": "Confirmar la pantalla final cuando esté disponible",
      "text": "Your user name:",
      "timeoutSeconds": 15,
      "continueOnError": true
    }
  ]
}
